title: Two in court for 20-year-old’s murder
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men were arrested...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men were arrested and have since appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court for the murder of the 20-year-old Lwamkelo Bukani.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men were arrested and have since appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court for the murder of the 20-year-old Lwamkelo Bukani."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bukani’s body was found with multiple stab wounds in a small dumpsite behind a home in Lonwabo Street in KwaNonqaba, just after 07:30 last Monday, 8 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The accused, Refilwe Lethoba (25) and Mziyanda Nyila (24), were arrested last Thursday, 11 September, and made their first court appearance the following day.","html":"The accused, Refilwe Lethoba (25) and Mziyanda Nyila (24), were arrested last Thursday, 11 September, and made their first court appearance the following day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matter was postponed and they are expected to make their next appearance on Friday, 19 September.","html":"The matter was postponed and they are expected to make their next appearance on Friday, 19 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Man fatally stabbed in KwaNonqaba identified","html":"Previous article: Man fatally stabbed in KwaNonqaba identified"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
